{% extends "base.html" %} {% load i18n %} {% block title %}{% translate "Email Setup Guide" %}{% endblock %} {% block breadcrumb %}
  • {% translate "Documentation" %}
  • {% translate "Features" %}
  • {% translate "Email" %}
    • {% endblock %} {% block content %}
    {% translate "On This Page" %}
    • {% translate "Overview" %}
    • {% translate "Gmail Setup" %}
    • {% translate "Project Settings" %}
    • {% translate "Testing" %}

    {% translate "Email Setup Guide" %}

    {% translate "Learn how to configure email notifications for your Django project." %}

    {% translate "Overview" %}

    {% translate "This guide is for setting up email in production. In development, emails are printed to the console - no configuration needed." %}

    {% translate "This template supports email functionality for features like contact forms, password resets, and user notifications. Email is disabled by default to prevent accidental sending during development." %}

    {% translate "Why Use Email?" %}

    {% translate "Email is essential for user registration confirmations, password resets, contact form notifications, and other automated communications. Without proper email setup, users won't receive important messages." %}

    {% translate "Gmail Setup" %}

    {% translate "This template uses Gmail SMTP. To send emails from your Gmail account, you need to create an App Password." %}

    {% translate "Important:" %}

    {% translate "You cannot use your regular Gmail password. Google requires an App Password for third-party access. This also requires 2-Factor Authentication on your Google account." %}

    {% translate "Step 1: Enable 2-Factor Authentication" %}

    1. {% translate "Go to your" %} Google Account Security
    2. {% translate "Under 'How you sign in to Google', select" %} 2-Step Verification
    3. {% translate "Follow the steps to enable 2-Factor Authentication" %}

    {% translate "Step 2: Create App Password" %}

    1. {% translate "Go to" %} App Passwords
      {% translate "(you may need to sign in again)" %}
    2. {% translate "In the 'Select app' dropdown, choose" %} Mail
    3. {% translate "In the 'Select device' dropdown, choose" %} Other (Custom name)
    4. {% translate "Enter a name like 'Django Project' and click" %} Generate
    5. {% translate "Copy the 16-character password (remove any spaces when adding to .env)" %}
    {% translate "Note:" %}

    {% translate "The App Password only shows once. Make sure to copy it immediately - you won't be able to see it again!" %}

    {% translate "Project Settings" %}

    {% translate "Add the following to your .env file in production:" %}

    # Enable email functionality
DJANGO_EMAIL_ENABLED=True

# Your Gmail address
DJANGO_EMAIL_HOST_USER=your-email@gmail.com

# The App Password you generated (no spaces!)
DJANGO_EMAIL_HOST_PASSWORD=xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx

# Email address messages appear to come from
DJANGO_SERVER_EMAIL=noreply@yourdomain.com

# Your email address (for receiving contact form messages)
PROJECT_ADMIN_EMAILS=admin@yourdomain.com

    {% translate "For Development" %}

    {% translate "In development, emails are printed to the console instead of being sent. Simply leave" %} DJANGO_EMAIL_ENABLED=False {% translate "(or remove it) to use console email backend." %}

    {% translate "Testing" %}

    {% translate "To test your email configuration, you can use Django's shell:" %}

    python manage.py shell

    {% translate "Then run:" %}

    from django.core.mail import send_mail
send_mail(
    'Test Email',
    'This is a test email from your Django project.',
    'noreply@yourdomain.com',
    ['your-email@gmail.com'],
    fail_silently=False,
)

    {% translate "If everything is configured correctly, you should receive the email in your inbox." %}

    {% translate "Troubleshooting" %}
    • {% translate "Make sure you enabled 2-Factor Authentication on your Google account" %}
    • {% translate "Double-check you're using the App Password, not your regular Gmail password" %}
    • {% translate "Verify the App Password was generated for 'Mail' app, not other apps" %}
    • {% translate "Check your Gmail inbox for security alerts about the new sign-in" %}
    {% endblock %}
